reviews.review_description: Once I got the game and started playing I couldn’t stop! The levels are so neat, fun, and cool! And the npcs, that I think are called eyes are so fun to mess around with! Highly recommend the game to everyone!!!

This is a unique puzzle game and good storyline which keeps you interested. I like that there are different characters you can control to go through a level. The levels are challenging but it is fun to figure out the solution and you get a lot of gameplay out of this one making it worth your money. Overall great experience.
